content:
GITHUB VS RENDER DEPLOYMENT GAP AUDIT — IVX

Work only on:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

Goal:
Find how many GitHub updates/commits exist that are not deployed live, then finish deployment.

1. GitHub audit
Return:
- repo
- branch
- latest GitHub commit SHA
- latest 20 commits
- commit date
- commit message
- files changed per commit

2. Render/live audit
Return:
- Render service name
- Render service ID
- latest Render deploy ID
- latest Render deploy status
- deployed commit SHA
- deploy timestamp
- /health commit SHA
- /version commit SHA if available

3. Compare
Compare:
- latest GitHub SHA
- Render deployed SHA
- /health SHA

Mark:
- MATCH
- MISMATCH
- UNKNOWN

4. Find undeployed GitHub work
List every commit on GitHub after the live deployed commit.

For each undeployed commit return:
- commit SHA
- message
- date
- files changed
- deployment status: NOT_DEPLOYED

5. Count
Return:
- total GitHub commits checked
- total deployed commits confirmed
- total undeployed commits
- total files changed but not deployed

6. Deploy missing work
If undeployed commits exist:
- trigger Render deploy from latest main
- wait until complete
- verify /health 200
- verify live SHA changed
- verify chat works
- verify frontend opens latest conversation

7. Final output only

REPO:
BRANCH:
LATEST_GITHUB_SHA:
LIVE_HEALTH_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_DEPLOYED_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:
COMMITS_CHECKED:
UNDEPLOYED_COMMITS_COUNT:
UNDEPLOYED_COMMITS_LIST:
UNDEPLOYED_FILES_COUNT:
DEPLOY_TRIGGERED:
DEPLOY_STATUS:
HEALTH_STATUS:
CHAT_STATUS:
LAST_CONVERSATION_STATUS:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Allowed FINAL_STATUS:
COMPLETE
BLOCKED
UNVERIFIED

Do not say COMPLETE unless latest GitHub SHA = Render deployed SHA = /health SHA and chat last conversation works live.
